subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: What a beautiful gathering! In all the places I went.... According to the blessed command, it is not permitted to fall on the knees.... A certain Kurd was awakened in the morning to say his prayers
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Shrines and Holy places
